title: Process
description: Series of activities that interact to produce a result.

definitions.definition: Series of activities that interact to produce a result.
definitions.notes: - A Process may occur once-only or be recurrent or periodic.
definitions.sources:
- [Wikipedia](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Process)

- ISO:9000 [ [RD7](https://www.iso.org/standard/45481.html) ]
- RD7: ISO 9000:2015(en), Quality management systems - Fundamentals and vocabulary
